preliminary_expected_failure.reason: Before CP00-070 evidence files existed, RP00 validator correctly reported missing manifest, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection artifacts for the CP00-070 included units.

preliminary_targeted_test_failure.reason: Initial CP00-070 drift assertion expected only the assembler-level message; the upstream CP00-069 validator correctly failed closed earlier. The assertion was narrowed to accept both fail-closed paths and the suite then passed.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Never emit a tool call. Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema." --json-schema "$(tr -d '\n' < /tmp/cp00-070-review-schema.json)" --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-070-review-prompt-valid.txt > /tmp/cp00-070-claude-review-output-valid.json

invalid_claude_attempts.reason: The model's tool call could not be parsed (retry also failed).
Bare mode could not use local Claude login state; command returned Not logged in and was not accepted as a pack-level review.
CLI configuration was invalid because mcpServers was omitted; command did not reach a valid review state.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-070 is metadata-only and writes no product state.
Exactly one valid pack-level Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review was accepted for this pack.
Claude returned P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=3.
Final commands are rerun after these pack evidence files are written so the evidence refs are live.

plan_regeneration.reason: Run after CP00-070 evidence creation to move next queue to CP00-071 without recording it as a validation-only command.
